name: mini-hot-hub
description: 迷你今日热榜 — 微博 / 知乎 / B站 热搜聚合

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build:server:deploy: npm install --prefix server --include=dev && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
